Evooq
Visit site

A trustworthy, scalable site that establishes Evooq as the wealthtech of choice for the world's leading private banks.

Development
Webflow Development
Component-Based Build
CMS Setup

Branding & Design
Creative development
Website design
Photography
Finance, refined.

Evooq is a Swiss wealthtech trusted by some of the world's largest private banks, asset managers, and pension funds across Europe, North America, and Asia – backed by a strategic investment from J.P. Morgan Private Bank.

‍

But despite the company's standing in the industry, its existing site fell short of conveying the credibility, product depth, or sophistication its audience expected. With a new brand identity ready to launch, we set out to build a Webflow site that explains Evooq's offering at a glance, holds its own with senior decision-makers, and turns interest into demo requests.

‍

The result is a component-based system designed to scale – bringing product structure, visual identity, and content together into a cohesive digital foundation Evooq can keep building on for years.

Photography

To bring the brand to life, we also produced a custom library of 50 images — corporate enough to belong in a boardroom, warm enough to feel human. In an industry stripped of personality almost by default, these visuals give Evooq something rare: a face, a tone, a sense of the people behind the platform.

Bilyana Ruzhenova
Head of Marketing, Evooq
Felt like part of the team.
Working with Oimachi was easy in a way that doesn’t happen often. They understood what we were trying to solve as a business and made decisions that reflected it. Especially in design, where constraints turned into surprisingly creative solutions. The project ran exactly as planned, without a single moment feeling at risk. By the end, they didn’t feel like an agency anymore - just part of the team.
Want a peek at how we could collaborate?
Book a call
